summary: Gate rc=0 but Phase 1 acceptance/Decision Lock are not satisfied (tests not actually run, Langfuse unhealthy/optional, PII canary simulated, endpoints/ports mismatch, checkpoint data still plaintext).

blockers.title: Phase1 gate is not fail-closed (pytest can PASS while failing)
blockers.details: `scripts/gates/phase1_gate.sh:109` runs pytest through `... | tee ... | tail -30` without pipefail and marks the gate optional (`required=false`). Gate output shows `No module named pytest` but still records pytest=PASSED.
blockers.expected: Gate fails if pytest cannot run or any tests fail.
blockers.actual: Gate can pass even when pytest is missing/failing.
blockers.recommended_fix: Make pytest required and enforce pipeline failure (set -o pipefail or check PIPESTATUS); run pytest from venv or install `.[dev]` deps.
validation_steps: Disable pytest and confirm gate fails
Restore deps and confirm gate passes only when pytest exits 0

blockers.title: Langfuse is required but currently unhealthy and treated optional
blockers.details: `scripts/gates/phase1_gate.sh:167` marks langfuse optional. `gate_artifacts/phase1/langfuse_health.json` shows healthy=false/unreachable, violating acceptance health check on :3001.
blockers.expected: Langfuse reachable and gate fails if not.
blockers.actual: Langfuse unreachable but overall gate still PASS.
blockers.recommended_fix: Make Langfuse gate required; ensure compose/env starts it; treat Langfuse failures as failures in soak/gate.
validation_steps: Rerun phase1 gate and confirm langfuse=PASSED

blockers.title: PII canary gate does not prove anything (simulated injection, DB scan skipped)
blockers.details: `scripts/gates/pii_canary_gate.sh:121-126` says simulated injection; DB scan is skipped when psql missing (`scripts/gates/pii_canary_gate.sh:85-88`) yet returns PASS. This cannot prove canary absence in logs/traces/DB.
blockers.expected: Gate injects a canary via a real workflow/API call and fails if any surface cannot be scanned.
blockers.actual: No real injection; DB scan can be skipped; still PASS.
blockers.recommended_fix: Invoke a real request containing the canary, then scan logs + Langfuse traces export + DB using psql or Python DB adapter; fail-closed if scans cannot run.
validation_steps: Run canary gate with DB+Langfuse running
Force a canary leak and confirm gate fails

blockers.title: Decision-locked endpoints/ports not followed
blockers.details: Roadmap/Decision Lock specify Deal tools map to `/deals*` and Agent API is :8095. This repo uses `/api/deals*` (`scripts/probes/deal_api_contract_probe.py:65,194-196`; `src/core/agent/deal_api_client.py:340,386,444`) and configures backend/gates for :8091 (`docker-compose.yml:73`; `scripts/gates/phase1_gate.sh:37`).
repro_steps: Compare with Decision Lock + Roadmap mapping
blockers.expected: Ports and endpoint paths match locked spec.
blockers.actual: Ports and Deal API paths differ from locked spec.
blockers.recommended_fix: Align to locked ports and `/deals*` mapping, or update the locked spec if the canonical contract is different.
validation_steps: Rerun probe and confirm contract paths match spec
Run gate and confirm health checks target correct ports

blockers.title: Checkpoint encryption is not applied to persisted checkpoints
blockers.details: `src/core/hitl/checkpoint.py:204` persists `checkpoint_data` plaintext (JSONB). `scripts/gates/kill9_encrypted_test.sh` only tests encrypt/decrypt in memory, not ciphertext-at-rest in DB or restart resume.
repro_steps: Save a checkpoint with a unique marker
Query DB and observe marker in execution_checkpoints.checkpoint_data
blockers.expected: Checkpoint persistence is encrypted at rest and kill-9 recovery uses DB-backed encrypted state.
blockers.actual: Checkpoint data is stored plaintext; kill-9 gate is a simulation.
blockers.recommended_fix: Encrypt/decrypt in the real checkpoint store (or implement SecurePostgresSaver for the actual checkpoint layer) and update kill-9 gate to validate restart/resume from DB.
validation_steps: Assert DB no longer contains plaintext marker
Run real kill-9/restart and confirm resume works

majors.title: CRITICAL `transition_deal` can execute without approval
majors.details: `src/core/agent/deal_tools.py:289-307` only warns if approval_id is missing but still calls the Deal API. `src/core/agent/tools.py` does not enforce requires_approval.
majors.actual: transition_deal can call the API without approval.
majors.recommended_fix: Fail-closed in ToolRegistry.execute + transition_deal_tool when approval_id is missing/invalid.
validation_steps: Verify no API call occurs without approval
Verify API call occurs with approval

majors.title: Deal tools gate does not validate tool wiring or real transition
majors.details: `scripts/gates/tests/test_deal_tools.py` calls Deal API directly and uses probe_mode for transition; phase1 gate executes it (`scripts/gates/phase1_gate.sh:208`). This can generate artifacts without running tool handlers or an approved transition.
repro_steps: Inspect test_deal_tools.py for direct httpx calls and probe_mode
majors.expected: Gate executes tool handlers and verifies approved transition (or explicit dry-run semantics).
majors.actual: Artifacts can be produced without tool execution; transition is only a probe.
majors.recommended_fix: Wire tool-execution test into the gate and validate approved transition behavior.
validation_steps: Run gate and confirm artifacts are produced by tool execution and transition is approved

next_actions_for_builder.summary: Make phase1 gate fail-closed (pytest/pipefail + required gates).
how_to_validate: Break pytest and confirm nonzero exit

next_actions_for_builder.summary: Bring up Langfuse on :3001 and require health=200 in gate/soak.
Replace simulated PII canary with real injection + scans of logs/traces/DB (fail-closed).
how_to_validate: Run canary gate and confirm all scans execute
Introduce canary leak and confirm FAIL

next_actions_for_builder.summary: Align ports/endpoints to Decision Lock (Agent API :8095; Deal API `/deals*`) or update locked spec if different.
Encrypt checkpoint persistence at rest and make kill9_encrypted gate validate DB-backed resume.
how_to_validate: DB contains only ciphertext for checkpoint_data

evidence: gate_output.log: pytest shows 'No module named pytest' but gate records PASSED
scripts/gates/phase1_gate.sh:109 optional pytest + pipeline without pipefail
scripts/gates/pii_canary_gate.sh:121-126 simulated injection; :85-88 skips DB scan
docker-compose.yml:73 backend uses :8091 while Decision Lock lists Agent API :8095
